testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_launch_ready_flows.py:31: in test_health_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_checkout_create_and_status
